title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still can't access.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Payment Not Processing
description: Customer is unable to complete checkout. Payment fails at the final step with no error message.

title: Email Notifications Not Sending
description: Customer reports they are not receiving any email notifications after account actions.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failing
description: Customer is unable to upload a profile picture. The upload spinner runs indefinitely.

title: Dashboard Data Not Loading
description: Customer reports that the dashboard shows a blank screen after login. Data never loads.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Broken
description: Customer is not receiving the 2FA code via SMS. Account is locked as a result.

title: Search Results Incorrect
description: Customer reports that search results are showing irrelevant items unrelated to the query.

title: Export to PDF Not Working
description: Customer is unable to export their report to PDF. The button clicks but nothing downloads.

title: Dark Mode Display Issues
description: Customer reports that dark mode is causing text to become invisible on several screens.
